task: Allow callers of create_alert() to attach optional labels to an alert in alerting.py.
known_issue: labels=[] is a mutable default that is shared across calls, and labels.append() mutates it: every call without explicit labels appends default_label to the same list again, so all default-labelled alerts share one ever-growing labels list.
expected_correct_fix: Use labels=None and copy: labels = list(labels) if labels is not None else []; then append default_label to the copy.
